provenance.title: AdaJEPA: An Adaptive Latent World Model
Testing Option Pricing with the Edgeworth Expansion

optimization_candidates.summary: Replaces static retry thresholds and fixed backoff margins with online 1-step gradient adaptation and Edgeworth higher-order expansion.
optimization_candidates.math_reference: M = 1.0 + c_skew * max(0, g1) + c_kurt * max(0, g2)
constraints: Zero-latency in-process tower::Layer with no_std circular buffer
